---
title: "structureHarvester Summary Workflow"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)

report_dir <- dirname(knitr::current_input(dir = TRUE))
repo_root <- normalizePath(file.path(report_dir, "..", ".."), mustWork = FALSE)

summary_file <- file.path(repo_root, "results", "structureHarvester", "summary.txt")
evanno_file <- file.path(repo_root, "results", "structureHarvester", "evanno.txt")
output_dir <- file.path(repo_root, "figure", "structureHarvester")
dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

## Goal

This report visualizes the `structureHarvester` outputs and summarizes the main interpretation from:

- `summary.txt`
- `evanno.txt`

## Read the K-level Summary Table

```{r helpers}
extract_table_block <- function(path, header_pattern) {
  lines <- readr::read_lines(path)
  header_idx <- grep(header_pattern, lines)
  if (length(header_idx) == 0) {
    stop("Could not find table header matching: ", header_pattern)
  }
  start_idx <- header_idx[1] + 1
  end_candidates <- which(seq_along(lines) > start_idx & (lines == "" | str_detect(lines, "^##########") | str_detect(lines, "^Software written")))
  end_idx <- if (length(end_candidates) > 0) min(end_candidates) - 1 else length(lines)
  lines[start_idx:end_idx]
}

summary_k <- readr::read_tsv(
  I(extract_table_block(summary_file, "^# K\\tReps\\tmean est\\. LnP\\(Data\\)")),
  col_names = c("K", "Reps", "mean_lnP", "sd_lnP"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

summary_runs <- readr::read_tsv(
  I(extract_table_block(summary_file, "^# File name\\tRun #\\tK\\tEst\\. Ln prob\\. of data")),
  col_names = c("file_name", "run_number", "K", "est_lnP", "mean_llh", "var_llh"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(run_number = as.integer(run_number))

evanno <- readr::read_tsv(
  I(extract_table_block(evanno_file, "^# K\\tReps\\tMean LnP\\(K\\)")),
  col_names = c("K", "Reps", "Mean_LnP_K", "Stdev_LnP_K", "Ln_prime", "Abs_Ln_double_prime", "Delta_K"),
  na = c("NA"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

summary_k
```

## Mean LnP(Data) Across K

```{r mean-lnp, fig.width=9, fig.height=6}
best_mean_lnp <- summary_k %>%
  slice_max(order_by = mean_lnP, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE)

ggplot(summary_k, aes(x = K, y = mean_lnP)) +
  geom_line(color = "#2c7fb8", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_point(color = "#2c7fb8", size = 2.2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_lnP - sd_lnP, ymax = mean_lnP + sd_lnP), width = 0.15, color = "#2c7fb8") +
  geom_point(data = best_mean_lnp, color = "#d95f02", size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean estimated LnP(Data) across K",
    subtitle = "Error bars show standard deviation across 5 replicates",
    x = "K",
    y = "Mean estimated LnP(Data)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)
```

## Replicate-specific LnP(Data)

```{r run-lnp, fig.width=9, fig.height=6}
ggplot(summary_runs, aes(x = K, y = est_lnP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.14, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.75, color = "#7570b3") +
  geom_line(
    data = summary_k,
    aes(x = K, y = mean_lnP),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "#1b9e77",
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = summary_k,
    aes(x = K, y = mean_lnP),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "#1b9e77",
    size = 2.2
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Replicate-specific estimated LnP(Data)",
    subtitle = "Purple points are individual runs; green line is the mean by K",
    x = "K",
    y = "Estimated LnP(Data)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)
```

## Evanno Delta K

```{r delta-k, fig.width=9, fig.height=6}
best_delta_k <- evanno %>%
  filter(!is.na(Delta_K)) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = Delta_K, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE)

ggplot(evanno, aes(x = K, y = Delta_K)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#d95f02", alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_point(data = best_delta_k, color = "black", size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Evanno Delta K profile",
    subtitle = "Highest Delta K is highlighted",
    x = "K",
    y = "Delta K"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)
```

## Run-to-run Variability

```{r sd-lnp, fig.width=9, fig.height=6}
ggplot(summary_k, aes(x = K, y = sd_lnP)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#636363", alpha = 0.9) +
  labs(
    title = "Run-to-run variability by K",
    subtitle = "Standard deviation of estimated LnP(Data) across replicates",
    x = "K",
    y = "SD of estimated LnP(Data)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)
```

## Interpretation

```{r interpretation, results='asis'}
best_delta_k <- evanno %>%
  filter(!is.na(Delta_K)) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = Delta_K, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE)

best_mean_lnp <- summary_k %>%
  slice_max(order_by = mean_lnP, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE)

cat(
  paste0(
    "- The strongest Evanno signal is at **K = ", best_delta_k$K,
    "** with **Delta K = ", sprintf('%.3f', best_delta_k$Delta_K), "**.\n",
    "- The highest mean estimated LnP(Data) occurs at **K = ", best_mean_lnp$K,
    "** (", sprintf('%.2f', best_mean_lnp$mean_lnP), "), which is expected to increase with larger K values.\n",
    "- In this run set, the Evanno criterion favors a coarse uppermost split at **K = ", best_delta_k$K,
    "**, while the LnP(Data) trend suggests additional hierarchical structure may exist at higher K.\n",
    "- Several higher-K solutions show substantially larger among-run variance, so those K values should be interpreted more cautiously unless they are also biologically well supported.\n"
  )
)
```

## Save Parsed Tables and Figures

```{r save-outputs}
readr::write_csv(summary_k, file.path(output_dir, "structureHarvester_summary_by_K.csv"))
readr::write_csv(summary_runs, file.path(output_dir, "structureHarvester_summary_by_run.csv"))
readr::write_csv(evanno, file.path(output_dir, "structureHarvester_evanno.csv"))
```
